title: scratch assay
steps: Make the “十” glyph in the back of 24-well plate medially, with the marker pen.
24 hours after the up-regulation and down-regulation of the Nrf2, scratches along the “十” mark using the 10-ul pipette tip,trying to keep the tip vertical and not tilted.
Wash the 24-well plate three times with PBS, and then ,add 1ml serum-free medium into the 24-well plate.
The 24-well plates were cultured in a 37-degree, 5% CO2 incubator. Measure the scratch spacing after culturing cells 0,24,48 hours.
creator: Ning Chen
